home.auth_required_message: To create a story and share with friends, you must log in first.
home.error_create_story: We could not create the story
home.header_subtitle: Share your story, get reflections from friends
home.card_description: Record a personal story and invite friends to share their reflections

auth.error_fields_required: Please fill in email and password
auth.subtitle: Share moments, create memories
auth.switch_to_signup: Don't have an account? Sign up now

settings.title: Settings
settings.language_restart_message: The app will restart to apply the new language

myStories.title: My Stories
myStories.login_required_subtitle: Your stories are saved in the cloud when you're logged in

thankYou.title: Thank you!
thankYou.subtitle: Your reflections were sent successfully
thankYou.message_title: Your videos are on their way to {{creatorName}}
thankYou.message_text: When all friends finish recording, {{creatorName}} will get an emotional video with all reflections combined
thankYou.download_title: Want to create your own stories?
thankYou.download_text: Download Reflectly and create emotional video stories with your friends

record.permission_camera_mic: We need camera and microphone permission

instructions.title: Player Instructions
instructions.general_desc: What do you want your friends to do in response to the story?
instructions.general_placeholder: E.g.: Share a similar moment you experienced...
instructions.timing_desc: How much time to allow for each of the 3 reflection videos?
instructions.publishing_confirm_text:
Enabling this will allow publishing the final video online.

Each participant will be asked to consent before recording.

Do you approve?
instructions.publishing_on_desc: Participants will be asked to approve publishing before recording
instructions.publishing_off_desc: The video will be private only — no consent request
instructions.social_on_desc: The final video can be shared on social media
instructions.social_off_desc: The final video will be private only
instructions.community_toggle: Open this story to community members
instructions.community_on_desc: Community members can see and join the story
instructions.community_off_desc: The story will be private — only those with a direct invite
instructions.approval_open_desc: First to join will enter automatically until spots are filled
instructions.approval_manual_desc: Each participant waits for your approval before receiving a recording link
instructions.uploading_subtext: This may take a few seconds
instructions.error_upload: We could not upload the video. Try again.
instructions.error_upload_generic: An error occurred while uploading the video.

whatsapp.title: Invite Friends
whatsapp.share_desc: Send the invitation to friends you want to participate in your story
whatsapp.tip: Tap the share button as many times as you want to send to many friends!
whatsapp.skip_note: You can continue even if you haven't shared yet
whatsapp.test_desc: Enter as a player to test the flow (including music during recording)
whatsapp.message_with_link:
Hi! 🎬

You're invited to share a reflection in the story "{{storyName}}" 🎥

Tap the link and follow the instructions:
{{participantLink}}

Thank you! ❤️
whatsapp.message_no_link:
Hi! 🎬

You're invited to share a reflection in the story "{{storyName}}"

Install the Reflectly app and open the link.

Thank you! ❤️

playerView.title: You're invited to watch!
playerView.subtitle: {{creatorName}} shared a story with you
playerView.btn_record: I watched! I want to record

community.title: Community Stories
community.auth_required_text: You must log in to join a story
community.profile_required_text: To apply, you must fill out a brief profile card
community.application_sent_text: The story creator will approve your request. You'll be notified when approved.

memberOnboarding.title: My Community Card
memberOnboarding.bio_hint: Who you are, where you're from, what interests you
memberOnboarding.bio_placeholder: E.g.: Theater actor from Tel Aviv, arts school graduate, loves intimate productions...
memberOnboarding.experience_hint: Shows, courses, schools, films, commercials, etc.
memberOnboarding.experience_placeholder: E.g.: 3 years at Amcha Theater, acting course with Yosi Folk, Beigeleh snack commercial 2022...
memberOnboarding.reel_hint: Link to YouTube, Vimeo, Drive video, etc.
memberOnboarding.permission_gallery: Please allow gallery access in settings

musicSelection.title: Background Music
musicSelection.description: Choose a musical atmosphere to play in the background during recording and inspire participants

formatSelection.title: Video Style
formatSelection.section_format_desc: Choose how your story will be displayed (tap "Preview" for a larger view)
formatSelection.section_bg_desc: Add special effects to the video
formatSelection.help_text: Your choices will be processed by AI for the final video
formatSelection.fmt_filmstrip_desc: Scrolling frames like a film reel

processing.complete_desc: Your video was edited successfully and is ready to view

editRoom.title: Edit Room
editRoom.drag_hint: Long press and drag to change edit order
editRoom.empty_subtext: Send the link to friends so they can record
editRoom.edit_hint: You can edit even without all reflections
editRoom.no_clips_alert_text: No reflections have been received from participants yet
editRoom.converting_subtext: This may take up to 30 seconds
editRoom.error_convert_text: Cannot convert the video. Try again.
editRoom.error_network: Network error. Check your internet connection.
editRoom.error_not_uploaded: Video not yet uploaded — try again in a few moments
editRoom.rejection_text: {{count}} participant(s) did not approve the final video publishing.
editRoom.rejection_question: What would you like to do?
editRoom.rejection_updated_text: The story became a private project without publishing

playerRecord.permission_text: We need camera permission to record
playerRecord.consent_body:
{{creatorName}} wants to publish the final video online.

Your participation in the video may be publicly visible.
You must consent before recording.
playerRecord.consent_checkbox: I agree that my videos will be used in the final video and published online
playerRecord.intro_body:
Record {{count}} short reflections — your personal response to the video you just watched.
Speak, sing, move, dance — each clip can have a completely different approach.
playerRecord.error_no_clips: You need to record at least one reflection
playerRecord.error_upload: Some videos were not uploaded. Try again.

finalVideo.music_server_down_text:
Cannot play without music.
Start the server and update the tunnel.
finalVideo.guide_desc: To save the video with the 3D animation, activate the iPhone's screen recording.
finalVideo.guide_step_1: Swipe down from the upper right corner (Control Center)
finalVideo.guide_step_3: Return to the app and tap "Ready, Go!"
finalVideo.stop_recording_text:
The video ended. Stop your screen recording now.
The video with 3D is saved in your gallery!
finalVideo.permission_gallery: Allow gallery access in settings to choose a photo
finalVideo.saved_multi: {{count}} videos were merged and saved to your gallery
finalVideo.error_instagram: Instagram is not installed on this device
finalVideo.error_tiktok: TikTok is not installed on this device
finalVideo.permission_gallery_save: Please allow gallery access to save the video
